ast.name: name
ast.source: Move the selected item down one in the suggester.
ast.target: 在建议器中将选中的项目向下移动一位。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move the selected item up one in the suggester.

ast.name: name
ast.source: Select the highlighted item in the suggester.
